en: The Internet, repository of all human knowledge and videos of goats singing Taylor Swift songs.
ko: 살면서 건강하고 행복하게 해주는 건 뭘까요

en: -♪ Now I'm lying on the cold hard ground ♪ -♪ Ah! Ah! Ah! Ah!
-♪ Trouble, trouble, trouble me ♪ -♪ Ah! Ah! Ah! Ah! ♪
Come on! The Internet is an incredible place!
And tonight we need to talk about an issue that is impacting it.
ko: 밀레니얼 세대에게 가장 중요한 인생 목표를 물은

en: It's net neutrality. If that term rings a bell, we actually talked about it
in our fifth-ever episode three years ago, a piece that got a weird amount of attention.
ko: 80% 이상이 중요한 인생 목표가 부자가 되는 것이라고 했어요

en: Last week tonight with John Oliver has languished in relative obscurity since its debut in April.
ko: 같은 청년의 50%는 또 다른 중요한 인생 목표가

en: But this week, an Oliver diatribe about net neutrality went viral.
Hey, fuck you, lady! I didn't languish in relative obscurity.

ko: 우리는 끊임없이 더 노력하고 더 열심히 밀어붙이라는 말을 듣고

en: Relative obscurity is my middle name.
ko: 더 많은 것을 성취하라는 말을 듣죠
